taxonomy: Trachoma sarcochiloides is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Trachoma and the family Orchidaceae. Trachoma sarcochiloides is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants. This species is native to New Guinea, where it is found in the wild. The classification of Trachoma sarcochiloides reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the orchid family.
